items.message: Maven annotation processor signal detected; the analyzer does not inspect generated sources or infer generated APIs from processors.
Maven build-helper add-source goal detected; the analyzer does not scan added or generated sources by default.
Maven generated-source configuration signal detected; the analyzer records the bounded build signal only and does not inspect configured generated output.
Maven source generator plugin declaration detected; the analyzer records the source-visible build signal only and does not scan generated sources by default.
Maven OpenAPI/Swagger code generation plugin declaration detected; the analyzer does not run code generation, scan generated sources by default, or create endpoint/API facts from this build signal.
Maven OpenAPI/Swagger code generation plugin signal detected; the analyzer does not run generation or scan generated sources by default.

OpenAPI/Swagger spec file detected by filename; declared operations, when supported, are reported separately under api_surface.openapi.operations, and this warning does not reconstruct generated APIs.
Maven module has a child pom.xml but no supported Java source, test, or resource roots; the analyzer does not inspect this module.
